title: Crispy Cream Dum Soup
description: A high-protein-friendly sick-day Indian dish featuring salty dumplings in a creamy sauce that's crispy on the outside and comforting on the inside.

ingredients.name: heavy cream
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's pasteurized and safe for consumption.

ingredients.name: dumplings
ingredients.notes: Preferably made with high-protein ingredients like quinoa or lentils.

instructions: Blend whole milk and heavy cream in a blender until smooth.
In a large pot, warm the blended mixture over medium heat. Add salt and pepper to taste, then stir continuously for about 5 minutes or until it reaches desired thickness.
Gently drop dumplings into the soup while stirring gently to prevent breaking them. Cover and simmer for another 3-5 minutes.
Serve hot with additional fresh herbs or a squeeze of lemon if preferred.
